sourceScope.primarySourceFile: NY Regulations/2021 VLM Report_DRAFT-(1-27-2020) with academy Updates V1-Reg-192-11-NYCRR-S102.pdf
sourceScope.sourceTitle: Minimum Standards for Determining Reserve Liabilities and Non-Forfeiture Values for Preneed Life Insurance
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Current through March 15, 2020; page-image wording backstop remains required because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.

observedSectionWindows.note: Title page, purpose, applicability, definitions, and transition-rule window.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single Regulation 192 PDF.
Do not widen into AG files, practice notes, or other NY regulation files in the same wave.
Keep the opening title / purpose / applicability / definitions / transition-rule language review-only until a human confirms the indexing decision.
Keep the page-image wording backstop visible because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.
Keep the batch source-bound and review-only.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other guideline files in the same wave.

topicMap.label: Opening title, purpose, applicability, definitions, and transition rules
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep this slice within pages 1-3 and do not absorb other NY regulation files.

proposedBatches.title: Regulation 192 opening title, purpose, applicability, definitions, and transition-rule window

pageTarget.notes: Capture the full three-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 3 boundary.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the full three-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 3 boundary.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat the purpose, applicability, reserve-liability, and transition-rule language as regulatory text when it directs what the company must do.
reviewStandards.definitionOrTerminology: Treat preneed life insurance, reserve liabilities, non-forfeiture values, and related terms as terminology when the text explains rather than directs.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to Regulation 179, Regulation 126, and related statutory material as cross-reference context unless operationalized.
reviewStandards.backgroundContent: Treat the title page and section labels as background unless they impose a requirement.
reviewStandards.boundaryControlWindow: Treat the three-page slice as a review-only window that should not be merged forward.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat the indexing choice and the noisy OCR-like text layer as requiring human actuarial interpretation unless the text is explicit.
reviewStandards.sourceQualityCaveat: Treat text-layer noise or encoding issues as review-only caveats and do not widen the batch because of them.

appReady: export is sanitized, stable, and versioned

notes: Controlled Regulation 192 planning artifact. Planned batch 266 remains review-only by default and is not an extraction run.
